title: The Fourth Tenant Main Trailer
prompt: Story: The Fourth Tenant (the-fourth-tenant) | Hook: Rent is collected from an apartment that appears on no official map. | Subgenre: supernatural mystery | Tone: EERIE | Location: Flood-district prewar apartment block | Villain: The Landlord of Rooms That Move | Villain worldview: People accept impossible rooms when paperwork feels safe. | Motifs: door chains, wet plaster, rent slips. Build 18-second story trailer with hook in first 3 seconds, middle clue escalation, and final unresolved threat card.
negativePrompt: Avoid low frame-rate jitter, avoid compression artifacts, avoid incoherent camera cuts, avoid on-screen logos/watermarks.
